# Ari Harrison

> Architect of the Engine Between Models and Decisions

## About

Focused on the boundary where model reasoning meets structured systems - and where correctness, constraints, and consequences begin to matter. The gap between foundation models and real-world decisions is architecture - systems that translate probabilistic reasoning into reliable action under domain constraints.

NovoMCP is one instantiation - applying this architecture to scientific discovery, where constraints are explicit and mistakes are costly. Two MCP servers - Novo for discovery intelligence and Novo Compute for GPU simulation - expose 69 tools to any AI assistant. From target identification to patient stratification. From OLED screening to electrolyte stability. Prediction layers over 122M+ indexed compounds, compliance systems that understand jurisdictional complexity, an engine that turns conversation into computation.

NovoWorkbench is the desktop surface. Researchers paste a molecule and get 3D structure, pharmacokinetic predictions, regulatory screening, and AI-optimized analogs - in under 2 seconds. Model-agnostic. Local-first. Signed and notarized by Apple.

Before this: autonomous discovery systems in high-stakes manufacturing - reinforcement learning agents that diagnosed failures and improved without intervention. The work is the engine between model reasoning and reliable action. The domain is wherever the stakes are high enough to demand it.

## The Stack

- The Engine: 122M+ compounds, 100+ data fields each, sub-50ms
- Compliance: FAVES V4 - 8 jurisdictions, 1,585 structural alerts
- MCP Tools: 69 tools across 2 servers (Novo + Novo Compute)
- Verticals: Drug discovery + materials science
- Desktop Surface: NovoWorkbench - local-first, model-agnostic
- Ecosystem: NVIDIA Inception, AWS Activate, Microsoft Founders Hub

## Publications

Research on how domain structure shapes reasoning - and how reasoning systems adapt under different objective and constraint regimes.

- FAVES V4: A Production-Deployed Compliance and Liability Screening System for Drug Discovery at 122M-Compound Scale (2026.05, ChemRxiv) - Production compliance and liability screening aligned to HHS/ONC FAVES and NIST AI 600-1. Single-API call returns regulatory status (DEA / FDA / CWC / EPA / EU REACH), 1,585 structural alerts, BOILED-Egg permeability, and InChIKey prior-art lookup. ~5 ms live latency, precomputed cache of 122,407,635 documents. Validated 362/362 compounds post-fix across five predetermined tests with documented governance bundle. DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv.15003738/v2

- NovoExpert: State-of-the-Art ADMET Prediction on TDC Benchmarks (2026.04, ChemRxiv) - Five SOTA wins on Therapeutics Data Commons ADMET endpoints: CYP2D6 (0.778 AUPRC), CYP3A4 (0.916 AUPRC), CYP3A4 Substrate (0.648 AUPRC), Clearance Hepatocyte (0.602 Spearman), DILI (0.922 AUROC). CatBoost ensembles with MapLight and GIN fingerprints. DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv.15000061/v2

## Projects

- Novo + Novo Compute: A domain-constrained reasoning system where models must operate through tools, data, and regulatory constraints to produce valid outputs. 69 tools across two MCP servers. Novo handles discovery intelligence - 122M+ compounds, ADMET predictions, FAVES V4 compliance, research search, lead optimization, the autonomous discovery funnel. Novo Compute handles simulation - GPU docking, GROMACS MD, quantum chemistry, neural network potentials, structure prediction, materials science. https://novomcp.com/novo / https://novomcp.com/novo-compute

- NovoWorkbench - The Desktop Surface: 3D rendering, pharmacokinetic predictions, regulatory screening, AI-optimized analogs in under 2 seconds. Model-agnostic. Local-first. Apple signed/notarized.

- FAVES V4 - Compliance Inline: Three-tier detection with 1,585 structural alert patterns, 8 jurisdictions, BOILED-Egg permeability, prior art checks. 100% sensitivity/specificity on 102-compound benchmark.
